name: Roasted Vegetable Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound bell peppers (red or green), diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Spread the diced bell peppers on a baking sheet.
3. Add the matchstick carrots and continue spreading them evenly.
4. Arrange the half-moon zucchini slices over the vegetables.
5. Place the cubed eggplant on top of the vegetables.
6. Slice the onion thinly and spread it over the layers.
7. Drizzle 2 teaspoons of olive oil over the vegetables, ensuring they are evenly coated.
8. Sprinkle ground black pepper and 6 cloves of garlic finely minced over the vegetable layering.
9. Arrange lasagna noodles on top of the vegetables.
10. Cover the baking dish with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
11. Remove the foil and continue baking until the vegetables are tender and the cheese is golden, about another 20-25 minutes.
12. Turn off the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
